Once your account is deleted, all of its: Cho luath 's a thèid an cunntas agad a dhubhadh às, thèid a goireasan agus an dàta gu lèir a dhubhadh às gu maireannach. Feuch an dearbhadh thu gum bu mhath leat do chunntas a dhubhadh às maireannach a dhubhadh às.

Cho luath ‘s a thèid do chunntas a dhubhadh às, thèid na goireasan agus an dàta gu lèir a dhubhadh às gu buan. Cuir a-steach am facal-faire agad gus dearbhadh gu bheil thu airson an cunntas agad a sguabadh às gu buan.

When you enable two-factor authenticatio: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
You will be prompted for a secure, rando: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
